BUILD.bazel.content:
load("//kernel:fmt.bzl", "fmt_test")
load("//kernel:tagged.bzl", "tagged_file")

tagged_file(
    name = "buildkite_agent_txt_tag",
    src = "buildkite--agent.txt",
    tags = ["doc"],
)

tagged_file(
    name = "cloudflare_artifact_fs_txt_tag",
    src = "cloudflare--artifact-fs.txt",
    tags = ["doc"],
)

tagged_file(
    name = "galleybytes_terraform_operator_txt_tag",
    src = "galleybytes--terraform-operator.txt",
    tags = ["doc"],
)

fmt_test(
    name = "build_bazel_fmt",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tool = "buildifier",
)

fmt_test(
    name = "buildkite_agent_txt_fmt",
    src = "buildkite--agent.txt",
    tool = "textfmt",
)

fmt_test(
    name = "cloudflare_artifact_fs_txt_fmt",
    src = "cloudflare--artifact-fs.txt",
    tool = "textfmt",
)

fmt_test(
    name = "galleybytes_terraform_operator_txt_fmt",
    src = "galleybytes--terraform-operator.txt",
    tool = "textfmt",
)

tagged_file(
    name = "build_bazel_tag",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tags = [
        "bazel",
        "bazel-build",
    ],
)
